creator: oleg@pobox.com
text:
A fetch error was reported while building linalg-4.3:
 http://people.freebsd.org/~fenner/errorlogs/oleg@pobox.com.html

The distribution tarball cannot be fetched. The Makefile of the port
uses ${MASTER_LOCAL_SITE} with ${MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR} set to "will".
That site used to contain the distribution archive.
It no longer does (it timeouts, to be precise), hence the problem.
